title: Receipt
description: A governance decision receipt issued by the FailSafe engine in response to an EvaluationRequest. Includes verdict, evidence, signing chain, and links to the ledger entry that anchored the decision.

receiptId.description: Unique receipt id (UUIDv4 or content hash).

evaluationRequestId.description: Reference back to the EvaluationRequest that triggered this receipt.

ref.description: Reference id within the named source.

conditions.description: Conditions attached to APPROVE_WITH_CONDITIONS or MODIFY verdicts.

ledgerEntryRef.description: Optional ledger entry id that recorded the decision.

signature.description: Cryptographic signature over the receipt body.

issuedBy.description: DID of the FailSafe instance issuing the receipt.
